title: Hydra memory citations state
description: Citation counts that drive skill promotion. Key format is 'learnings-<repo>.md#"<quote>"' where the file part is relative to $HYDRA_EXTERNAL_MEMORY_DIR (or ./memory/). Commander merges deltas emitted by scripts/parse-citations.sh into this file.

citations.description: Map of citation key -> entry. Keys follow '<file>#<quote>'; keys starting with underscore (e.g. _comment) are treated as meta and skipped.

count.description: Total number of times this entry has been cited across all tickets.

last_cited.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the most recent citation.

tickets.description: De-duplicated list of ticket refs that cited this entry.

promotion_threshold_reached.description: True when count >= 3 AND distinct tickets.length >= 3.

source.description: Provenance of the citation answer. 'operator' means a human answered this via the direct-drive chat path (legacy). 'supervisor' means the citation was produced by a supervisor agent answering supervisor.resolve_question — via the MCP escalation path (Phase 2 agent-only interface). Optional; absent means legacy 'operator' (Phase 1 direct-drive, pre-MCP).
